summary: Virginia and its Democratic leaders asked the US Supreme Court to reinstate a new voter-approved congressional map that was designed to flip four Republican-held House seats in the November election.

summary: Vodafone Group Plc shares fell after the telecommunications operator lost clients in its key German market last quarter due to intense competition and a push to boost revenue per user.

title_cn: 德国监管机构敦促保险公司修复私人信贷问题
summary: Germany’s top financial regulator will step up pressure on insurers to address shortcomings in private credit investments and issued a warning on an asset class increasingly marketed to retail clients.

title: EQT Makes Final Intertek Bid as Investors Push for Deal Talks
title_cn: 投资者推动交易谈判，殷拓集团对 Intertek 提出最终收购要约
summary: EQT AB has made a fourth and final bid to acquire Intertek Group Plc as the British product-testing company comes under increasing pressure from its investors to pursue a deal.

title: Billionaire Olayans, Tech Firms Look to Ignite Saudi IPO Revival
title_cn: 亿万富翁奥拉扬和科技公司希望点燃沙特首次公开募股的复兴
summary: A raft of companies across sectors are pressing on with plans to list in Saudi Arabia, bolstered by gains in the benchmark since the regional war began.

title: Munich Re Says It Has Up to €2.5 Billion Private Credit Exposure
title_cn: 慕尼黑再保险称其私人信贷风险高达 25 亿欧元
summary: Munich Re said it has investments of as much as €2.5 billion ($2.9 billion) in private credit, an asset class that has been facing fund redemptions and scrutiny of underwriting standards.

title: Macron Announces €23 Billion Investment Deals at Africa Summit
title_cn: 马克龙在非洲峰会上宣布 230 亿欧元投资协议
summary: The France-Africa summit has mobilized deals amounting to 23 billion euros ($27 billion), according to President Emmanuel Macron.

title: EQT Raises Bid Again for UK Testing Firm Intertek
title_cn: EQT 再次提高对英国测试公司 Intertek 的出价
summary: EQT AB raised its takeover offer for Intertek Group Plc to roughly £9.2 billion ($12.5 billion) as the private equity firm seeks to overcome repeated rejections from the UK product testing business.

title: UK 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 1998 on Political Uncertainty
title_cn: 由于政治不确定性，英国 30 年期国债收益率创 1998 年以来最高

title: Gilts Slump With UK’s Starmer Under Pressure to Stand Down
title_cn: 英国斯塔默面临下台压力，后备母猪暴跌
summary: UK government bonds slid to send long-term yields to the highest in nearly three decades, as a growing number of Labour party politicians called on their leader Keir Starmer to step down following large losses in local elections last week.

title: Paschi Posts Rising Revenue Amid Mediobanca’s Integration
title_cn: Paschi 收入因 Mediobanca 整合而增长
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA reported higher first-quarter revenue as Chief Executive Officer Luigi Lovaglio continue to integrate Mediobanca SpA.

title: Tech Rally Stalls as Oil Rises on Iran Stalemate: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗僵局导致油价上涨，科技股涨势停滞：市场总结
summary: A retreat in high-flying technology stocks is dragging equities lower as traders wait for US inflation data. Brent rose for a third straight day, with the ceasefire in the Middle East appearing increasingly fragile.

title: Gilts Have Global Relevance Right Now: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 后备母猪现在具有全球相关性：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Siemens Energy CFO Sees Data Center Demand Into Next Decade
title_cn: 西门子能源首席财务官预计未来十年数据中心需求
summary: Siemens Energy is benefiting from surging artificial intelligence use that’s driving demand for power-hungry data centers, especially in the US. In an interview on Bloomberg Daybreak Europe, CFO Maria Ferraro said she sees demand going well "into the next decade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Says Inflation to Stay 'Persistently Higher'
title_cn: 摩根大通称通胀将“持续走高”
summary: Meera Chandan, global FX strategy co-head at JPMorgan, discusses the outlook for the dollar and inflation. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she says she expects inflation to stay "persistently higher," with central banks such as the Federal Reserve "quite constrained" in how much easing they can deliver. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War: Trump Says Ceasefire on 'Life Support' Ahead of China Visit | Daybreak Europe 5/12/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普在中国访问前表示停火以维持生命欧洲黎明 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary:
On today's show, the ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer. The Middle East and trade are expected to top the agenda when President Trump and Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping meet Thursday morning in Beijing.

The Kospi saw wild swings — shedding more than $300 billion in value over 97 minutes, and then paring losses — after a top South Korean official floated the idea of a “citizen dividend” using AI profits but later clarified it would be funded by excess profits.

And Keir Starmer is facing growing pressure to step down as Britain’s prime minister after dozens of members of Parliament, including Cabinet allies, are said to have joined calls for Starmer to set out a timetable for his departure.

Today's guest: Maria Ferraro, Siemens Energy, CFO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yen Gains Abruptly Then Pulls Back During Bessent Visit to Japan
title_cn: 贝森特访问日本期间日元突然上涨然后回落
summary: The yen strengthened sharply versus the dollar on Tuesday before falling back during a visit by US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to Japan.

title: Amazon Kicks Off Debut Swiss Franc Bond Sale in Record Six Parts
title_cn: 亚马逊启动首次瑞士法郎债券发售 创纪录的六部分
summary: Amazon.com Inc. has begun the sale of its first Swiss franc bonds as it looks to raise a record six-part deal in the currency.

title: Hitachi Said to Mull $640 Million Stake Sale in Machine Firm
title_cn: 据称日立正在考虑出售机器公司 6.4 亿美元的股份
summary: Japanese industrial electronics maker Hitachi Ltd. is looking to offload about 8% of Hitachi Construction Machinery Co. shares in block trades, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ethiopian in Talks With Airbus for Widebody, Regional Jet Order
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚航空正在与空中客车公司洽谈宽体支线飞机订单
summary: Ethiopian Airlines Group is in early talks with Airbus SE to purchase regional and widebody aircraft as Africa’s largest carrier looks to expand its foothold on the continent and beyond.

title: Bain, LY Said to Offer to Buy Kakaku, Rivaling EQT Takeover Bid
title_cn: 贝恩公司 (Bain, LY) 表示将收购 Kakaku，与 EQT 的收购要约相竞争
summary: Bain Capital and LY Corp. have submitted a joint offer to acquire Tokyo-listed Kakaku.com Inc., the $3.7 billion price comparison site operator fielding a takeover by EQT AB.

title: Bristol-Myers Inks Up to $15 Billion Licensing Deal With Hengrui
title_cn: 百时美施贵宝与恒瑞签署价值高达 150 亿美元的许可协议
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Co. inked a collaboration and licensing deal with Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co. that could be valued at as much as $15.2 billion, as the US drugmaker seeks to leverage China’s efficiency in early development.

title: DroneShield Plunges as Regulator Probes Filings, Share Trades
title_cn: 随着监管机构调查备案和股票交易，DroneShield 暴跌
summary: DroneShield Ltd.’s stock tumbled to the lowest in about three months after the Australian counter-drone firm said the nation’s financial regulator was reviewing its disclosures and share trades from November.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 5/12/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 5/12/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Gain as Trump Casts Doubt Over Ceasefire With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普对与伊朗的停火表示怀疑，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil pushed higher as US President Donald Trump cast doubt over the ceasefire with Iran after rejecting Tehran’s latest peace offer, prolonging the effective closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: ADNOC Gas: Ready to Export LNG As Soon As Hormuz Reopens
title_cn: 阿布扎比国家石油公司天然气公司：一旦霍尔木兹重新开放，就准备出口液化天然气
summary:
ADNOC Gas reported resilient 1Q earnings, with net income beating analyst estimates despite disruption to exports through the Strait of Hormuz. The company is also managing the impact of recent incidents at its Habshan facility, with plans to reach 80% capacity by the end of 2026. Peter van Driel, CFO of ADNOC Gas spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on the disruptions caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Weighs Emergency Steps to Protect Forex Reserves | Insight with Haslinda Amin 05/12/2026
title_cn: 印度考虑采取紧急措施保护外汇储备哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 05/12/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi-Trump Meet to Extend China Markets’ Trade-Detente Rally
title_cn: 习近平与特朗普会面以延长中国市场的贸易缓和反弹
summary: China investors are counting on the summit between Xi Jinping and Donald Trump to deliver just enough to sustain the detente trade underpinning stocks and the yuan.

title: Korea Floats ‘Citizen Dividend’ from AI Gain
title_cn: 韩国从人工智能收益中获得“公民红利”
summary: A top South Korean policymaker said the nation should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, underscoring growing pressure to redistribute gains from a boom that’s enriched chipmakers like Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. Bloomberg's Sangmi Cha breaks down what we know. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Motsepe Says Partnerships Boosting South Africa’s Mining Sector
title_cn: 莫特塞佩表示合作伙伴关系将推动南非采矿业的发展
summary: South Africa has regained competitiveness in mining because of partnerships between the public and private sector to tackle regulatory issues and structural bottlenecks, according to billionaire Patrice Motsepe.

title: Korea Roils Market by Floating ‘Citizen Dividend’ from AI
title_cn: 韩国通过人工智能带来的“公民红利”搅动市场
summary: A top South Korean policymaker said the nation should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, underscoring growing pressure to redistribute gains from a boom that’s enriched chipmakers like Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.

title: Prosus Targets $3.6 Billion From Just Eat Sales in Euro Push
title_cn: Prosus 目标是通过欧元推动 Just Eat 销售额达到 36 亿美元
summary: Prosus NV is targeting $3.6 billion in revenue from Just Eat Takeaway.com in a year as it looks to boost efficiency in its European food-delivery business at a time of rapid consolidation in the sector.

title: India’s Titan Sees Brief Slowdown if Gold Buying Curbed
title_cn: 如果黄金购买受到抑制，印度巨头将出现短暂放缓
summary: Titan CFO, Ashok Sonthalia, says there could be a temporary slowdown in demand if the government implemented any measures to curb gold-buying. That's after Prime Minister, Narendra Modi, called on Indians to avoid buying gold for at least a year to preserve foreign-exchange reserves. Sonthalia appeared exclusively on Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Weighs Emergency Measures to Protect Foreign Exchange
title_cn: 印度考虑采取紧急措施保护外汇
summary: India is considering emergency steps to shore up foreign-exchange reserves, including hiking fuel prices and curbing non-essential imports like gold and electronic goods, to help cushion the impact of the Iran war, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Chinese Stocks See Risk Appetite Revival as Margin Loans Jump
title_cn: 随着保证金贷款的增加，中国股市的风险偏好有所复苏
summary: Risk appetite is returning to China’s tech sector, with margin lending, trading volumes and benchmarks all climbing back to highs thanks to growing bets that a recent rally will continue.

title: Why AI Matters More Than Iran War in Markets
title_cn: 为什么人工智能在市场上比伊朗战争更重要
summary: Global equities have rallied to record levels, fuelled by euphoria over artificial intelligence. Investors' risk appetite has held up despite volatility in energy markets caused by the war in Iran. Bloomberg Markets Live Executive Editor Mark Cudmore and Bloomberg TV Markets Producer Anthony Stephens discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Exports Spyware to Human Rights Abusers, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 看门狗称欧洲向侵犯人权者出口间谍软件
summary: European companies have sold controversial surveillance technologies to countries known for violating human rights, a new report has found.

title: Korean Stocks Swing as Policymaker Mulls AI Dividend
title_cn: 政策制定者考虑人工智能红利，韩国股市波动
summary: A South Korean policymaker has suggested paying citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, fueling sharp swings in Korean stocks. According to Franklin Templeton’s Christy Tan, such programs show that “Asian economies do want to provide a signal of ownership in the shared future that involves digitalization and AI.”

title: Australia Watchdog Says Money Launderers Ramping Up AI for Scams
title_cn: 澳大利亚监管机构称洗钱者正在加强人工智能诈骗
summary: Australia’s financial crimes watchdog warned of a heightened threat of money laundering linked to artificial intelligence that has been used by crooks to scale up activities, automate processes and create fake documents.

title: SoftBank in Talks for Major Data Center Project in France
title_cn: 软银正在洽谈法国主要数据中心项目
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son has held talks about unveiling an ambitious French AI data center project with President Emmanuel Macron in the coming weeks, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: S&P Rises as Chipmakers Lift Stocks | The Close 5/11/2026
title_cn: 芯片制造商提振股价，标准普尔指数上涨收盘价 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Bank of America Securities' Jill Carey Hall, Brown Harris Stevens CEO Bess Freedman, Jeffries' Brian Tanquilut, Grain CEO & Founder David Grain, Cambria Investment Management's Mebane Faber, Hirtle & Co.'s Founder & Executive Chair Jon Hirtle, Oliver Wyman Partner Daniel Tannebaum, 55/Redefined Group's CEO Lyndsey Simpson & KPMG Chief Economist Diane Swonk. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What’s Next for Telecom and Digital Infrastructure
title_cn: 电信和数字基础设施的下一步是什么
summary: Grain Management CEO and founder David Grain discusses what's next for telecom and digital infrastructure. He sees real workloads absorbing infrastructure and says they're 'very' active in deploying capital. He speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GitLab Says Will Cut Jobs to Spend on Growth in ‘Agentic Era’
title_cn: 亚搏体育appGitLab表示将在“代理时代”裁员以实现增长
summary: GitLab Inc., which makes software that helps developers on coding projects, said it is cutting jobs to free up money to spend on the market opportunity for artificial intelligence agents.

title: Software Firm ServiceNow Plans to Raise $4 Billion in Bond Sale
title_cn: 软件公司 ServiceNow 计划通过债券发行筹集 40 亿美元
summary: Software company ServiceNow Inc. is looking to raise about $4 billion from a potential US high-grade bond sale tied to the software firm’s recent acquisitions.

title: Emerging Currencies Drop as Iran Conflict Dims Risk Appetite
title_cn: 伊朗冲突削弱风险偏好，新兴货币下跌
summary: Emerging-market currencies weakened against the dollar on Monday as oil advanced and tensions in the Middle East escalated, with President Donald Trump and Iran’s leadership rejecting each other’s peace proposals and signaling no end in sight to the 10-week-old war.

title: UK Fintech Wise Makes US Trading Debut With Dual Listing
title_cn: 英国 Fintech Wise 通过双重上市在美国上市
summary: Wise Group Plc made its trading debut in the US with a Nasdaq listing as the financial technology firm tries to take advantage of a larger stock market and its legions of investors.

title: Verizon’s Global Hybrid Bond-Sale Push Reaches $12 Billion
title_cn: Verizon 全球混合债券发行规模达 120 亿美元
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. has raised about $12 billion from hybrid debt sales over the past six months as the US telecommunications company explores ways to support its investment-grade ratings.

title: Consumers Still Buying Beauty Products That 'Matter to Them,' Says Sally Beauty CEO
title_cn: Sally Beauty 首席执行官表示，消费者仍在购买“对他们来说很重要”的美容产品
summary: Denise Paulonis, President and CEO of Sally Beauty Holdings, said that the beauty industry remains resilient to concerns around affordability as consumer remain consistent in buying beauty products that 'matter to them' like hair dye and nail accessories even if they are not replacing pricier items. Paulonis said that she remains optimistic about her company's growth as consumers explore new e-commerce avenues like the TikTok Shop.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Seeks $4.8 Billion in Upsized IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/11/2026
title_cn: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 寻求 48 亿美元的大规模 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Cerebras’ increased IPO plans as the AI chipmaker and data center operator boosts its offering plans by one-third to as much as $4.8 billion. Plus, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire explains what drove the company’s first-quarter revenue and his vision of an agent-led future. And, Google researchers say they have uncovered the first-ever zero-day attack built by AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Targeted $92 Billion Return on Early OpenAI Investment
title_cn: 微软的 OpenAI 早期投资目标回报为 920 亿美元
summary: Microsoft Corp. targeted a $92 billion return from its large early investments in OpenAI, a landmark arrangement that helped usher in the current AI era.

title: Fervo Energy Boosts IPO Target to $1.8 Billion
title_cn: Fervo Energy 将 IPO 目标提高至 18 亿美元
summary: Fervo Energy Co., a geothermal energy developer, is seeking to raise as much as $1.82 billion in a US initial public offering, raising its target from $1.33 billion.

title: Meta Sued by California County Over ‘Scam’ Advertisements
title_cn: Meta 因“诈骗”广告被加州县起诉
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was sued by Santa Clara County, California, over allegations that the company “knowingly facilitates and profits from billions of scam advertisements” on its social networks, including Facebook and Instagram.

title: Rezolve AI CEO Weighs In on Hostile Bid for Commerce.com
title_cn: Rezolve AI 首席执行官对 Commerce.com 的敌意收购发表评论
summary: Rezolve AI CEO Dan Wagner discusses the reason behind his company’s hostile bid for Commerce.com, including what he called an “embarrassing growth rate” by the takeover target. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Angi Becomes Latest Company to Announce AI Pivot
title_cn: Angi 成为最新一家宣布 AI Pivot 的公司
summary: Angi CEO Jeff Kip joins Bloomberg’s Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to discuss the company’s latest earnings, AI efforts, and Angi’s outlook on the housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sutskever Says His OpenAI Stake Worth About $7 Billion
title_cn: Sutskever 表示他持有的 OpenAI 股份价值约 70 亿美元
summary: OpenAI co-founder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever said his stake in the ChatGPT maker is worth roughly $7 billion, making him one of the largest individual shareholders in the artificial intelligence startup.

title: A $400 AI Bet That’s a High-Stakes Wager on the Future of Work
title_cn: 400 美元的人工智能赌注是对未来工作的高风险赌注
summary: AI is set to have a profound impact on the workforce and productivity, but by how much and how quickly are still being debated and bet on by academics. Bloomberg’s Stacey Vanek Smith describes the $400 wager on the future of work. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rates Just One Factor for Stablecoin Growth, Says Circle CEO
title_cn: Circle 首席执行官表示，评级只是稳定币增长的因素之一
summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle says it’s moving closer to a future where AI agents can make financial transactions. The company saw a 20% revenue surge in its first-quarter, though net income declined amid volatility in cryptocurrency markets. Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO's Schleif Says AI Stampede Fueling Rally Beyond Tech
title_cn: BMO 的施莱夫表示，人工智能的狂潮推动了科技之外的反弹
summary: Carol Schleif, chief market strategist for Bank of Montreal, says the buildout of AI infrastructure is lifting a broad cross section of stocks, not just a handful of tech names. She speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Optimistic on AI Surge, Ignoring Risks: Noviskis
title_cn: 市场对人工智能激增持乐观态度，忽视风险：Noviskis
summary: Jessica Noviskis, OCIO portfolio strategist at Marquette Associates, says market optimism is largely driven by strong earnings and the resurgence of the AI sector despite potential risks. "We are entirely pricing markets off of the good things that are happening," she said, "and ignoring the risks and the war and the potential for inflation and maybe rate hikes." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Ceasefire Fragile as US Rejects Tehran’s Latest Offer
title_cn: 美国拒绝德黑兰的最新提议，伊朗战争停火脆弱
summary: Shipping traffic in the Strait of Hormuz remained at a standstill on Tuesday, with oil rising after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest offer and suggested the ceasefire may not hold.

title: Fortescue Ordered to Pay $108 Million in Aboriginal Rights Case
title_cn: Fortescue 在原住民权利案中被判支付 1.08 亿美元
summary: Fortescue Ltd., one of the world’s biggest iron ore miners, has been ordered to pay A$150 million ($108 million) in damages to an Aboriginal group after being found to have operated the Solomon Hub project on their land without consent.

title: Starmer Losing Fight to Stay in Power as Rebellion Spreads
title_cn: 随着叛乱蔓延，斯塔默失去了继续掌权的斗争
summary: Keir Starmer was facing growing pressure to step down as Britain’s prime minister after dozens of members of Parliament, including Cabinet allies, joined the calls for him to set out a timetable for his departure.

title: UK Bonds Fall as Pressure on Starmer to Quit Grows
title_cn: 随着斯塔默退出的压力加大，英国债券下跌
summary: UK government bonds fell as a growing number of Labour Party lawmakers called on their leader, Prime Minister Keir Starmer, to step down following large losses in local elections last week. Bloomberg’s Ven Ram breaks down the situation.

title: Labour Group Criticizes UK Fiscal Caution With Starmer on Brink
title_cn: 工党组织批评英国财政谨慎，斯塔默濒临崩溃
summary: A caucus of more than 100 lawmakers on the left wing of Britain’s governing Labour Party called for a “new economic framework” with less “caution” on fiscal policy, in an apparent attempt to change direction if Keir Starmer quits as prime minister.

title: Boeing CEO to Join Trump, US Delegation in China
title_cn: 波音公司首席执行官将与特朗普及美国驻华代表团一起
summary: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg is expected to join the US delegation to China and has hinted at a major deal, saying President Donald Trump's visit would be "a meaningful opportunity for us." China is considering a deal for about 500 of the 737 Max jets. Bloomberg's Danny Lee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s Top Jeweler Expects Brief Slowdown If Gold Buying Curbed
title_cn: 如果黄金购买受到抑制，印度顶级珠宝商预计将出现短暂放缓
summary: Titan Co. Ltd., India’s largest jeweler, expects a temporary slowdown in demand if the government implements any measures to curb gold-buying, but is confident that domestic consumption will remain resilient in the long term.

title: Starmer Faces Cabinet Showdown With Premiership on the Brink
title_cn: 斯塔默面临内阁摊牌，英超岌岌可危
summary: Keir Starmer

title: UK’s Starmer Faces Mounting Pressure to Step Down
title_cn: 英国斯塔默面临越来越大的下台压力
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is facing growing pressure to step down after more than 70 of 403 Members of Parliament from the governing Labour Party called for him to set out a timetable for his departure. The rebellion follows last week’s local elections, which saw Starmer’s Labour lose control of the Welsh parliament and almost three of every five English council seats it was defending. Bloomberg Opinion’s Rosa Prince has more. Her views are her own.

title: Japan’s Katayama Coordinating With Bessent on FX Policy
title_cn: 日本片山与 Bessent 就外汇政策进行协调
summary: Japan's Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama confirmed that her team is coordinating closely with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on currency policy. Bloomberg's Brian Fowler breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ramaphosa Defies Resignation Calls as Parliament Prepares Probe
title_cn: 议会准备调查拉马福萨无视辞职呼吁
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa rejected calls to resign and vowed to challenge a report criticizing his handling of a robbery at his farm in 2020, after the nation’s top court resurrected the scandal.

title: Japan’s Katayama Says Coordinating With Bessent on FX Policy
title_cn: 日本片山表示将与 Bessent 就外汇政策进行协调
summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama confirmed that her team is coordinating closely with US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on currency policy, signaling tacit US approval of Japan’s recent suspected market intervention.

title: Duterte Ally Trapped in Philippine Senate Vows to Avoid Arrest
title_cn: 杜特尔特盟友被困菲律宾参议院誓言避免被捕
summary: The Philippine senator who emerged from hiding to cast a key vote in the upper house Monday has vowed to fight any attempt to execute an International Criminal Court arrest warrant over his role in the country’s notorious war on drugs.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is on 'Massive Life Support'
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火是“大规模生命支持”
summary: President Donald Trump has said the ceasefire between the US and Iran was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia Mulls Further Fuel Subsidy Cuts Even as Election Looms
title_cn: 即使选举临近，马来西亚仍考虑进一步削减燃料补贴
summary: Malaysia will continue with its fuel subsidy reform despite the possibility of a general election this year, according to Deputy Finance Minister Liew Chin Tong.

title: Merz to Meet German Coalition Partners as Reform Agenda Falters
title_cn: 改革议程停滞不前，默茨将与德国联盟伙伴会面
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is seeking to reverse his beleaguered government’s fortunes by getting an ambitious reform agenda back on track amid plummeting public support.

title: The EU’s Commission Chief Is Increasingly Seen as Too Powerful
title_cn: 欧盟委员会主席越来越被视为权力过大
summary: Ursula von der Leyen is facing pushback from some member countries.

title: Trump Delays Move to Lower Tariffs on Beef Imports, WSJ Says
title_cn: 《华尔街日报》称，特朗普推迟降低牛肉进口关税
summary: The Trump administration is delaying a plan to suspend tariffs on imported beef, according to the Wall Street Journal.

title: Trump to Meet Xi Thursday for High-Stakes US-China Summit
title_cn: 特朗普将于周四与习近平举行高风险的美中峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump and Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping will meet Thursday morning in Beijing, according to the White House, for a high-stakes summit that will be dominated by discussions on trade and the war in Iran.

title: Trump Set for Annual Medical Checkup on May 26 at Walter Reed
title_cn: 特朗普定于 5 月 26 日在沃尔特里德进行年度体检
summary: President Donald Trump will have his annual medical checkup at a hospital near Washington on May 26, the White House said Monday night.

title: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Massive Life Support’
title_cn: 特朗普称美伊停火是为了“大规模生命支持”
summary: The ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment Monday as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.

title: US-Iran Tensions Flare Ahead of Trump-Xi Meeting | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/11/2026
title_cn: 特习会前美伊紧张局势加剧权力平衡：最新版 05/11/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Jill Tokuda (D-HI), warns Taiwan "must not be a bargaining chip" during President Donald Trump's talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Tom Kloza, Chief Energy Advisor at Gulf Oil, says reopening the Strait of Hormuz is "the only lever you can pull that has a major impact" on fuel prices, warning gasoline could reach $5 a gallon or higher this summer if it stays closed. Mara Rudman, Professor at the University of Virginia's Miller Center and former Deputy Envoy for Middle East Peace at the US State Department, says there is likely no "near-term" diplomatic solution with Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Former FEMA Chief Hamilton to Lead Agency Again
title_cn: 特朗普任命前联邦应急管理局局长汉密尔顿再次领导该机构
summary: The Trump administration selected Cameron Hamilton to lead the Federal Emergency Management Agency, which is grappling with reduced staffing levels ahead of hurricane season in the Atlantic.

title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Chief Ends Term With Probes Unresolved
title_cn: 马来西亚反贪会主席任期结束，调查尚未解决
summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft chief Azam Baki is poised to end his six-year run with two investigations relating to him and the agency still pending.

title: Warsh’s Fed Nomination Clears First in Series of Senate Votes
title_cn: 沃什的美联储提名在参议院一系列投票中首次获得通过
summary: Kevin Warsh’s nomination to the Federal Reserve Board of Governors on Monday cleared the first in a series of Senate votes planned this week to install him as chair of the US central bank.

title: Jes Staley Asked to Sit for US House Interview Over Epstein Ties
title_cn: 杰斯·斯特利 (Jes Staley) 因爱泼斯坦关系被要求接受美国众议院采访
summary: US House lawmakers asked Jes Staley, a former top executive at Barclays Plc and  JPMorgan Chase & Co., for an interview in its ongoing probe into disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein.
